title: Reach SMP
description: Join The Reach SMP now and embark on a brand new captivating Minecraft journey. This modpack is designed for the multiplayer server of the same name, offering an immersive cooperative experience with integrated voice chat, now with much more mods!
body: Experience the boundless possibilities of Reach SMP, a Minecraft modpack designed for the multiplayer server of the same name. Immerse yourself in the visually stunning world enhanced by Iris Shaders, Biomes O' Plenty and much more!. Convenient client-side mods like ShulkerBoxTooltips simplify inventory management, providing essential information at a glance. Embark on thrilling adventures in all new dimensions like Twilight Forest and The Aether, forge alliances, and unleash your creativity in this incredible modpack that promises an unforgettable multiplayer experience, or your money back!
